headline: How The Man Group (LSE:EMG) Story Is Shifting As Analysts Rework Valuation Assumptions
summary: Analysts have been fine tuning their views on Man Group, with recent model updates nudging fair value from £2.98 to £3.01 and several price targets clustering around £2.90. Those tweaks line up with mixed commentary, where some firms have inched targets higher while others have trimmed them by a few pence or, in one case, by 25 GBp, reflecting different levels of comfort with valuation and execution risks. As you read on, you will see what is driving these moves and how to track the story as...

headline: How The Investment Story For KGHM Polska Miedz (WSE:KGH) Is Shifting After Recent Analyst Moves
summary: The central fair value estimate for KGHM Polska Miedz has shifted from PLN 283.92 to PLN 306.55, giving you an updated reference point for where analysts now see the shares as fairly valued. This change sits between a set of higher and lower price targets, from upgrades such as the UBS move to more cautious calls such as Citi’s PLN 209 Sell rating, and reflects an active debate over how much upside or downside is already in the price. Read on to see what is driving these opposing views and...

headline: Saudi Arabia Set for Oil Windfall After Hormuz Boosts Prices
summary: (Bloomberg) -- The blockade of the Strait of Hormuz is creating an economic split among oil exporters in the Persian Gulf, with Saudi Arabia and Oman set for a windfall and others including the United Arab Emirates seeing a drop in petrodollar income.Most Read from BloombergTrump Vows 25% Tariff on European Autos in Escalating Trade RiftSpirit Bailout Talks Said to Have Ended With Closure LoomingTrump Family-Backed Drone Firm Signs Weapons Deal With USTrump Rues State of Iran Talks, Says Prefers

headline: Gas prices are high right now. Use these 6 tools to save on fuel
summary: From joining a wholesale club to using memberships you may already have, these are our tips for saving at the pump.
